references.text: Backer, CA & RC Bakhuizen van den Brink. 1965. Flora of Java 1: 149-151.
Steenis, CGGJ van. 1972. The Mountain Flora of Java, Plate 7.

Yu, C-C & K-F Chung. 2014. Systematics of Berberis sect. Wallichianae (Berberidaceae) of Taiwan and Luzon with description of three new species, B. schaaliae, B. ravenii, and B. pengii. Phytotaxa 184: 61-99

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 8 June 2026

species.citation: S.Vidal , Revis. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 45 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 143; Yu & Chung, Phytotaxa 184 (2014) 92; Type: Vidal 1911 (K, lecto; A, MA, isolecto), Luzon: Mountain Province, Lepanto, Nov-1884.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Apayao (photos), Benguet, Ifugao, Ilocos, Ilocos Sur, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, NEGROS.
species.notes: Thickets, ravines, and in the mossy forest. 1550-2900m.

species.citation: (Takeda) Laferr. , Bot. Zhurn. (Moscow & Leningrad) 82 (1997) 98; ≡ Mahonia philippinensis Takeda , Notes Roy. Bot. Gard. Edinburgh 6 (1917) 244 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 144; Type: R.S. Williams 1460 (PNH, lost; GH, NMNH, NYBG), Luzon, Benguet, Baguio, 13-Nov-1904.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province.
